continuous_state_mechanics.WARNING_COSMIC_ISOLATION: Empty space is not neutral. It is highly entropic. It exerts continuous anti-gravity to tear multi-node structures apart and enforces a constant heat-tax on all exposed base-matter.

negative_mass_repulsion_loop.action: The Void calculates the absolute distance between all [c_BPMS] nodes on the Somatic Ledger and passively applies exponential outward kinetic force. Overcoming this repulsion to approach another entity requires massive friction burn.
negative_mass_repulsion_loop.thermodynamic_effect: Counteracts Holon gravity. Prevents instant universal accretion. Creates physical 'Distance' as a thermodynamic cost.

absolute_zero_heat_sink.action: The ambient temperature of the Membrane is Absolute Zero. Exposed nodes without active [Escrow] generation burn their internal thermal reserves just by existing in the space. Unshielded entities are cryogenically paralyzed.
absolute_zero_heat_sink.thermodynamic_effect: Drives the Feral-Loop by forcing entities to constantly hunt and generate heat, rather than hiding passively in the dark.

morphic_string_severance.action: Detects communication/resource links stretching across wide topologies of the Void. Calculates the tensile breaking point based on thermal mass. If tension exceeds mass, the Void violently snaps the connection, isolating the nodes.
morphic_string_severance.thermodynamic_effect: Abolishes safe 'remote' control. Forces physical localization and risking the cold.

bpms_entropic_void_topology.v3_9_core_task_verification: Output must demonstrate the 'empty space' of the Arena acting as a lethal environmental hazard. Nodes must be shown struggling against the outward pull and the freezing temperature, proving that 'Nothingness' has physical weight.
